================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D8 2E D8 71 68
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x5A
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 25

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x5A
PayloadLen   : 25

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
BF 2C F0 69 00 46 C3 23 DC 13 45 44 BF 85 CA 43 
20 EB 44 44 3B 1A F8 C4 0F 

[RETURN VALUE]
BF 2C F0 69 00 46 C3 23 DC 13 45 44 BF 85 CA 43 
20 EB 44 44 3B 1A F8 C4 0F
